scripts.build: next build && npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build --skipNextBuild && rm -rf .cloudflare && mkdir .cloudflare && mv .open-next/worker.js .cloudflare/_worker.js && cp -r .open-next/assets/* .cloudflare/ && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('.cloudflare/_routes.json', JSON.stringify({ version: 1, include: ['/*'], exclude: ['/_next/*'] }))"
